tool.name: request_logger
tool.description: Log HTTP requests/responses with search and analysis capabilities.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Log HTTP requests and responses for analysis - Search logged requests with filters - Analyze requests for patterns and security findings - Get summary of logged requests - Track testing session history

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The logging action: - log: Log a new request/response - search: Search logged requests with filters - analyze: Analyze logged requests for patterns - summarize: Get summary of logged requests - clear: Clear the request log

parameter.name: request
parameter.description: Request data to log (for log action). Contains: method, url, headers, body, response (status_code, headers, body), response_time

parameter.name: filters
parameter.description: Search filters: method, url_contains, status_code, min_response_time, has_error, body_contains, response_contains

parameter.name: limit
parameter.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 100)

returns.description: Logged request details, search results, or analysis

tool.examples:
# Log a request
log {"method": "GET", "url": "https://example.com/api", "response": {"status_code": 200}}
# Search logged requests
search {"method": "POST", "status_code": 500}
# Analyze requests
analyze
# Get summary
summarize
# Clear log
clear
